name: pdf-flow
description: PDF tools and Pro document workflows in a modern web application
author: PDF-Flow Team

scripts.test:e2e:core: npm run build && node scripts/run-playwright.mjs tests/e2e-playwright/pricing-checkout.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/feedback-widget.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/public-shell.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/public-marketing.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/tool-pages-matrix.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/route-payload.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/merge-pdf.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/compress-pdf.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/split-pdf.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/extract-pdf.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/advanced-pdf-workflows.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/local-pdf-workflows.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/cloud-tool-access.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/advanced-cloud-tools.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/history-page.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/legal-pages.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/availability-state.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/auth-state.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/profile-account.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/oauth-callback.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/payment-result.spec.ts tests/e2e-playwright/enterprise-dashboard.spec.ts --project=chromium --reporter=line
